about.hero_title: Built for Pakistani Students, By Pakistani Students
about.hero_desc: We understand the struggle of finding international scholarships — so we built the solution.
about.mission_quote: Every deserving student deserves a chance, regardless of resources.
about.mission_desc1: Smart Scholarship Guidance was created to remove the confusion and frustration students face when searching for scholarships abroad.
about.mission_desc2: We combine structured data, intelligent matching, and a student-first approach to make opportunities accessible.
about.problem1: Scholarship info is scattered across hundreds of websites
about.problem3: No personalized guidance for your specific profile
about.team_role: Full Stack Developer — IIUI BSCS F22
about.value_desc: We design everything with students in mind.

works.label: HOW IT WORKS
works.title: Three steps to your future
works.subtitle: From profile to acceptance — we guide you the whole way.
works.step1_desc: Share your academic background, interests, and goals in minutes.
works.step2_desc: Our engine ranks scholarships by your real eligibility — not guesses.
works.step3_desc: Get tailored guidance, deadlines, and document checklists.

footer.desc: Empowering students to reach the world.
